EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IStatsHistogram3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that controls stats and histogram.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("DBE269BF-6BDE-43F2-9BFB-D90551D7EFE3")]
public interface IStatsHistogram3 : IStatsHistogram2, IStatsHistogram

Properties

Covariances

Array of doubles, the covariances with the n bands of the raster.

object Covariances { get; set; }

Property Value

object

object Histogram { get; set; }

double Max { get; set; }

double Mean { get; set; }

double Min { get; set; }

PixelCount 

double PixelCount { get; }

RasterHistogram

The raster histogram.

IRasterHistogram RasterHistogram { get; }

Property Value

IRasterHistogram

Examples

Sample Snippet

Remarks

<P>An object used to manage the histogram of the raster pixels. It can be retrieved from a <STRONG>RasterBand</STRONG>.</P>

RasterStatistics

The raster statistics.

IRasterStatistics RasterStatistics { get; }

Property Value

IRasterStatistics

Examples

Sample Snippet

Remarks

<P>A <STRONG>RasterStatistics</STRONG> object provides access to statistics from a raster band.</P> <P>The <STRONG>RasterStatistics</STRONG> can be retrieved from a <STRONG>RasterBand</STRONG> using IRasterBand interface.</P>

StdDev 

double StdDev { get; set; }

Property Value

double
